response.justification: Despite extensive experience, Bogdan is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; his resume shows senior/staff-level responsibilities since 2014, with no indication of seeking entry-level growth. He lacks explicit React/Nest.js or PostgreSQL experience, and his German language skill is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin. His focus on DLang, embedded systems, and AI-agent infrastructure diverges from the renewable energy platform’s core stack.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript and Node.js across multiple domains
Strong open-source contributions and architectural thinking (e.g., GISCollective, Kubernetes)
Proven ability to learn and adapt across languages and systems (DLang, Swift, C++)
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; likely to be dissatisfied or leave quickly
No clear evidence of React, Nest.js, or PostgreSQL usage in recent roles
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
